title: VN-DARU: Vietnam Digital Asset Regulatory Uncertainty Index — replication code
description: Replication code and figures for the paper Constructing a Regulatory Uncertainty Index for Digital Assets in Vietnam (VN-DARU): A Quantitative Approach Based on News and Policy. The Google Colab notebook builds a weekly news-based index of digital-asset regulatory uncertainty for Vietnam (January 2021 – June 2026) from the GDELT Global Knowledge Graph via BigQuery, constructs four control variants, merges the index with Bitcoin realized volatility, and reproduces all validation tests, structural-break analyses around Law No. 71/2025/QH15, and figures reported in the paper.
